response.text:

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Islanded network in cascading deficit crisis. r0c0 SoC 11.5% (14 min autonomy). Synchronized peer requests + rejections suggest network gaming or genuine cascade.
